overall.description: Gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 featuring Geralt of Rivia exploring a medieval castle settlement during a foggy dawn. The character walks from a covered wooden bridge through a stone courtyard with a fountain, past a garden statue, and along a narrow cliffside trail overlooking a misty lake.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered wooden walkway overlooking castle cliff

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered wooden walkway, observing the castle towers across the misty valley

entered.detail: wooden roofed structure with support pillars creating a covered path
tall stone medieval tower with lit windows perched on cliff edge
dark wooden fence railing along the walkway edge
rocky cliff supporting the castle structure
traditional half-timbered house with dark wooden beams

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a covered wooden walkway with a view of a massive stone castle perched on a cliff across a misty valley. The scene is foggy and atmospheric, with timber-framed buildings visible to the left and wooden railings lining the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone courtyard with central fountain and burning braziers

events.description: exits covered walkway and enters open courtyard with stone fountain and arches

agents.ego_description: turning left into the courtyard and walking around the central fountain

entered.detail: circular stone fountain with multiple tiers in courtyard center
tall carved stone columns supporting archways
metal fire bowl with flames providing warm light

segments.scene_description: The character enters an open stone courtyard featuring a central fountain surrounded by carved stone pillars and burning braziers. The area is paved with patterned tiles and timber-framed buildings are visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: garden path with angel statue and stone benches

events.description: exits courtyard onto narrow garden path with stone statue

agents.ego_description: walking down the garden path toward the stone statue, following a villager ahead

notable_agents.action: villager in dark clothing walking ahead on the path toward the statue

entered.detail: tall stone statue of a winged figure on a pedestal
simple stone seating along the path
low stone wall bordering the garden path

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow garden path flanked by stone walls and benches, approaching a large winged angel statue. A villager walks ahead on the path, and timber-framed houses are visible through the trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow cliffside trail overlooking misty lake

events.description: enters narrow cliffside path between rock face and open drop
character stops at overlook to view the misty lake and distant castle

agents.ego_description: walking along the cliff edge then stopping to overlook the misty lake and forest below

entered.detail: steep rocky cliff wall forming the right boundary of the path
large body of water covered in morning fog with tree-covered islands
dense evergreen trees covering the hills across the lake
castle structure visible in the distance across the misty water

segments.scene_description: The character navigates a narrow dirt trail carved into the cliffside, with a steep rock face on the right and a dramatic drop to a misty lake on the left. The path opens to reveal a panoramic view of the fog-covered lake, distant forested islands, and the castle visible across the water.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the enclosed structures of a castle settlement out toward a vast, misty lakeside vista. It begins along a covered wooden walkway overlooking a foggy valley and a distant stone fortress, moving past timber-framed buildings and railings. As the character exits the walkway, the scene opens into a paved stone courtyard centered around a fountain with burning braziers and carved pillars. The path then shifts into a narrow garden lined with stone walls and benches, passing a winged angel statue and a villager before turning toward the edge of the settlement. Finally, the camera navigates a narrow dirt trail carved into a cliffside, where the enclosed architecture gives way to a panoramic view of a fog-covered lake and distant forested islands.
